titleStmt.title: SII 9.647: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao

No. 647. (A.R. Nos. 305 and 306 of 1925.) ON A BROKEN PILLAR LYING BEFORE THE RUINED TEMPLE OF VASANTA-MALLIKARJUNA AT DEVALAPURA, A HAMLET OF GAJAPURA, KUDLIGI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. These two numbers together form one inscription.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 147[4], Virōdhikṛit, Pushya, ba. 30, Sōmavāra corresponding to A.D. 1552 January 25, Monday, in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya. It records the gift of the village Pannula-Nūṅkanahaḷḷi to the god Vasanta-Mallikārjuna of Dēvalāpura made by Rāmappa-Nāyaka, son of Timmappa-Nāyaka of Vēlūr and agent to Kṛishṇapa-Nāyaka, son of Bayyapa-Nāyaka. The village was to be enjoyed by the piper Musiya-Rāvuta, son of Kōnayya-Rāvuta, for playing on two nāgasvaras and two drums in the temple. It also states that the goldsmith Siriyaṇṇa who engraved the inscription was granted a mānya land in the village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraśuṁbicaṁdracāma
ravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śa
vē . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanasakhavarṣa 1474
neya virōdhikṛtusaṁvatsarada puṣya ba 30 lu sōmavāra A
rdhōdayapu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalū śrīmanmahārājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa sadāśivadēva
mahārāyaru vidyānagariyalli sihvāsanārūḍhanāgi su
khasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttiruva kāladalli bai
panāyakara kruṣṇapanāyakaAyyanavara kāryyakke karta
rāda vēlūru tiṁmappanāyakana kumāra rāmappanāyaka
ru naṁma kṛṣṇapanāyakanavara Amaramāgaḷege sallu
va morabada sīmeyoḷagaṇa paṁnulanuṁkanahaḷḷiya
nu dēvalāpurada vasaṁtamallikārjunadēvarige yeraḍu ḍōḷu yera
ḍu nāgasvaravanu naḍasū yeṁdu biḷicēḍa kōnayyarāu

tana maga mukhavēṇiya musiyarāutage sadāśivadēvarā
yamahārāyara nirūpadiṁda Ardhōdaya sōmavāra
pu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalu koṭṭa grāma Ā grāmake saluva catusī
meyoḷagaṇa jala pāṣāṇa nidhi nikṣēpa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi siddha
(sidha) sādhyaṁgaḷeṁba Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmyavanu kāṇāciyāgi
Anubhavisikoṁḍu vasaṁtamallikārjunadēvara sēveya mā
ḍikoṁḍiru yeṁdu koṭa śilāsāsana . putrapautrapāra
ṁpareyāgi Anubhavisikoṁḍiri yeṁdu koṭa grāma mūgu
ḷada gadeya yoḷage Anubhavisūdu . svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ
paradattānupālanaṁ pahārēṇa svadattaṁ bhavēt . svadattāṁ
jāyatē
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhivarṣa sahasrāṇi

yī śilāśāsanava barada Akasāle
siriyaṇage vokuḷada kāḻa
gaṁbhada mānyavanu naḍesi ba
henu taṁma makaḷu śiśāṁtya naḍasi
bahenu .
Digital edition of SII 9.647 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
